sqlMap.select: select * from FinancialInstitutionLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FinancialInstitutionLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey FirmMember NatureOfCapOfServices DateInitiated DateEnded IsClient DateOfInsolvency LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp InstitutionName InstitutionState ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #FirmMember# #NatureOfCapOfServices# #DateInitiated# #DateEnded# #IsClient# #DateOfInsolvency# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #InstitutionName# #InstitutionState# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FinancialInstitutionLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FinancialInstitutionKey, FirmMember, NatureOfCapOfServices, DateInitiated, DateEnded, IsClient, DateOfInsolvency, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, InstitutionName, InstitutionState, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FinancialInstitutionLW where FinancialInstitutionKey = #FinancialInstitutionKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FinancialInstitutionLW set
FirmMember = #FirmMember# FirmMember = null NatureOfCapOfServices = #NatureOfCapOfServices# NatureOfCapOfServices = null DateInitiated = #DateInitiated# DateInitiated = null DateEnded = #DateEnded# DateEnded = null IsClient = #IsClient# IsClient = null DateOfInsolvency = #DateOfInsolvency# DateOfInsolvency = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null InstitutionName = #InstitutionName# InstitutionName = null InstitutionState = #InstitutionState# InstitutionState = null
where FinancialInstitutionKey = #FinancialInstitutionKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FinancialInstitutionLW where FinancialInstitutionKey = #FinancialInstitutionKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FinancialInstitutionLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FinancialInstitutionKey, FirmMember, NatureOfCapOfServices, DateInitiated, DateEnded, IsClient, DateOfInsolvency, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, InstitutionName, InstitutionState, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FinancialInstitutionLW where FinancialInstitutionKey = #FinancialInstitutionKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FinancialInstitutionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, FirmMember, NatureOfCapOfServices, DateInitiated, DateEnded, IsClient, DateOfInsolvency, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, InstitutionName, InstitutionState from FinancialInstitutionLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
